name: fable-mythos-controller
description: Auto-trigger Reliability Harness v2 Controller for ZCode. Detects coding tasks, generates a task-contract YAML, runs the deterministic Python controller, and returns a structured verification report. Mirrors the prompt-only harness behavior of fable-mythos-zcode but with a code-based machine-gate instead of LLM-based status emission.
author: emco1234
